caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on the topic of "Rural Community Food System," specifically focusing on "13R Retailers willing to source local & Product Cost/Price." The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on the left side, featuring a webpage with text explaining how retailers sourcing local products can increase availability, lower product costs, and support local consumption. On the right side, there is a circular diagram illustrating the relationships between various factors such as retailers willing to source local, product cost/price, and local consumption. The diagram uses different colored arrows and labels to show the flow and impact of these factors within the system. The overall aim seems to be to discuss the dynamics and benefits of local food sourcing for rural communities.
